text.headline: Power BI Report Server Administrator @ Passio Consulting
text.text:
Tag: Data Engineering / BI Platform Administration

Summary: Ensuring stability, governance, and performance of the Power BI Report Server platform in an on-premises banking environment.

  • Full administration of the Power BI RS platform (on-premises)
  • Access management, governance, and compliance
  • Development and maintenance of monitoring dashboards
  • Technical troubleshooting and incident resolution
  • Automation of repetitive tasks (Python / PowerShell)
  • Optimization of BI platform performance and reliability

text.headline: Teacher Assistant @ Le Wagon
text.text:
Tag: Teaching / Data Science Support

Summary: Supporting students in Data Science and Data Analytics bootcamps, ensuring smooth learning and technical understanding.

  • Assisted students with exercises, debugging, and programming logic
  • Provided support in Python, SQL, Pandas, and Machine Learning
  • Explained technical concepts clearly and effectively
  • Resolved technical issues during classes

text.headline: Project Manager @ Albatroz Engenharia
text.text:
Tag: Project Management / Software & Hardware Engineering

Summary: Led a multidisciplinary engineering team (5–9 people) delivering software and hardware projects for aviation and defense.

  • Managed a multidisciplinary engineering team (software, hardware, electronics)
  • Planned, executed, and delivered complex technical projects
  • Coordinated with clients, partners, and stakeholders
  • Ensured quality, documentation, and technical compliance
  • Managed timelines, resources, and priorities

text.headline: Researcher @ IDMEC
text.text:
Tag: R&D / Renewable Energy Modeling

Summary: Developed modeling tools for offshore renewable energy capacity scenarios.

  • Developed MATLAB-based software for energy capacity analysis
  • Contributed to the national Offshore Renewables Roadmap
  • Performed modeling, simulation, and scenario analysis
  • Prepared technical documentation and presented results

text.headline: Associate Engineer @ CERN - ATLAS Detector
text.text:
Tag: Engineering / Safety Systems / HMI

Summary: Supervised the FPIAA project, ensuring operational safety in ATLAS areas.

  • Defined HMI software specifications
  • Supervised system installations and testing
  • Created ATLAS maps and technical documentation
  • Trained teams for the SLIMOS desk
  • Coordinated with international teams

text.headline: Product Engineer @ Visteon
text.text:
Tag: Product Engineering / Automotive

Summary: Managed engineering changes and quality performance for automotive CD players.

  • Managed engineering change notices (ECNs)
  • Ensured product quality and performance
  • Acted as key interface between plant, support, customers, and design teams (UK/USA)
  • Performed failure analysis and implemented improvements
